title: Smoky Taco Stuffed Dates
description: A twist on traditional stuffed dates, these sweet and savory bites are perfect for a quick snack or appetizer.
instructions: Cut dates in half lengthwise and remove pits.
In a small bowl, mix together smoky, crumbled tacos, salt, pepper, and cumin.
Stuff each date with the taco mixture, dividing it evenly among the dates.
Place stuffed dates on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until dates are tender and filling is heated through.
Serve warm, garnished with additional smoky if desired.
